allow: Bash(sed -i 's|import { SpendingAnalysis } from ""./pages/SpendingAnalysis"";|import { SpendingAnalysis } from ""./pages/SpendingAnalysis"";\\nimport { M3u8DownloaderPage } from ""./pages/scripts/M3u8DownloaderPage"";|' main.tsx)
